issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1256: remaining Python asset sweep 6/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -type f -name '*.py' | sort; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1256 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.

Concurrent heartbeat lanes repeatedly advanced origin/main during publication, so the lane was first published on origin/big-go-1256 and then rebased onto the latest mainline before the successful final publish to origin/main.
